components.name: kernel
dependency_notes: Substrate-specific kernel choice is not selected in this pass.
risk_notes: Large trusted computing base; must be bounded by substrate trial evidence.
rejection_conditions: module inventory missing from release packet

components.name: bootloader
dependency_notes: Substrate and firmware mode determine final bootloader.
risk_notes: Misconfiguration can invalidate boot evidence.

components.name: shell
components.reason: Provides local operator and reviewer command access.
risk_notes: Shell expansion and script behavior must stay deterministic in tooling.
acceptance_gate: no network service enabled by shell profile
rejection_conditions: shell pulls GUI or default network service into Noether Core

components.name: firewall-tooling
components.reason: Supports default-deny local network posture and surface evidence.
dependency_notes: Candidate implementations include nftables or substrate equivalent.
risk_notes: Firewall presence does not prove runtime sandboxing or no-network enforcement.
rejection_conditions: firewall policy claims OS containment without kernel-level enforcement

components.name: daylight-validator
dependency_notes: Use existing Daylight lanes where they remain deterministic and local.
risk_notes: No hand-written score is authoritative.
acceptance_gate: score bound to current artifact hash before release authority
rejection_conditions: numeric score emitted without artifact hash

components.name: wuci-prism-tooling
components.reason: Repository contains Wuci-Prism tooling; v2.4 treats it as review/support tooling when present.
dependency_notes: Presence verified by repository paths tools/wuci-prism and tools/wuci_prism.py.
risk_notes: Must not create external validation or production authority claims.
acceptance_gate: local-only behavior documented for review use

components.name: alpine-openrc-init
components.reason: Starts only the frozen Noether Core boot, firewall, audit, and shutdown services.
dependency_notes: Noether Forge pins OpenRC and records each enabled runlevel link.
risk_notes: Unexpected package-generated runlevel links expand the privileged startup surface.

components.name: alpine-filesystem-tooling
components.reason: Provides the pinned musl, BusyBox, device, and filesystem substrate used by the live image.
dependency_notes: Exact signed APK payloads are mapped in the Noether Forge component map.
risk_notes: The authenticated kernel modloop remains a large hardware-support surface.
acceptance_gate: forbidden GUI and compiler packages absent

components.name: alpine-signature-manifest-tooling
components.reason: Verifies signed Alpine package metadata and provides local hash and signature inspection.
components.privilege_surface: local package database and evidence reads
dependency_notes: Uses Alpine apk-tools, Alpine public keys, and OpenSSL from the pinned closure.
risk_notes: Package signatures authenticate package origin; they do not grant WuciOS production authority.
acceptance_gate: every retained APK signature and digest verified
rejection_conditions: fixture key treated as release authority

components.name: wuci-ji-runtime
components.reason: Provides the current static Wuci-Ji command surface inside the reviewer image.
dependency_notes: Built from the current repository assembly sources and copied by exact digest.
risk_notes: Gate, publish, and trust decisions remain fail-closed and do not create production authority.
acceptance_gate: selftest passes in exact booted ISO
assembly regression passes in exact booted ISO
rejection_conditions: binary does not match source manifest

components.name: noether-runtime-audit
components.reason: Inventories accounts, packages, services, sockets, privileges, firewall policy, modules, and boot media.
components.privilege_surface: root boot-time verification and unprivileged status reads
dependency_notes: Runs from the pinned Python closure and writes runtime evidence under /run only.
risk_notes: A passing inventory is bounded to the measured boot and is not a general security proof.
acceptance_gate: runtime PASS marker emitted only after every check passes
boot-media SHA-256 matches the host artifact
rejection_conditions: runtime evidence not bound to exact ISO

components.name: noether-review-generation
components.reason: Generates deterministic manifests, SBOM, provenance, audits, boot traces, and readiness review material.
components.network_surface: none during build or review generation
dependency_notes: Networked acquisition is a separate explicit command; build and review are offline.
risk_notes: Internal readiness must remain distinct from signing, witness, hardware, tagging, and publication authority.
acceptance_gate: BIOS and UEFI boot traces pass
rejection_conditions: public release readiness claimed with external holds

components.name: ratpoison
components.reason: Candidate minimal operator shell window manager.
risk_notes: requires graphical stack
must not enter Noether Core
version and package hash must be pinned before acceptance

components.name: dwm
components.reason: Candidate minimal operator shell window manager with stricter patch and ownership gate.
dependency_notes: Patched or vendored code becomes WuciOS-owned review surface.
risk_notes: C language surface
patched/vendored code becomes WuciOS-owned attack surface
requires stricter patch audit
rejection_conditions: accepted without measurable advantage over ratpoison

components.name: xfce4
components.reason: Convenience desktop only; too broad for the serious base profile.
components.privilege_surface: user graphical session plus desktop services
risk_notes: too large for Noether Core
broad desktop dependency surface
may exist only as non-authoritative convenience profile
rejection_conditions: used as basis for release score

components.name: browser
components.reason: General browsing is outside the Noether Core release profile.
components.privilege_surface: user application with web content exposure
dependency_notes: Large dependency graph and web attack surface.
risk_notes: forbidden in Noether Core
developer convenience only
acceptance_gate: not present in Noether Core package manifest
rejection_conditions: installed by default in release profile
